creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 238074
v1

Moin moin 

kde@ would like to ask for the monthly KDE Frameworks exp-run.

This time, I expect some some fallout due to the minor version switching to being 3 digits long.

Patch is attached, and can also be found here:
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-KDE-Update-KDE-Frameworks-to-5.100.patch

mfg Tobias
